# IconSecurity.DetectMimeTypeFromMagicBytes method

Detects the MIME type of an image from its magic bytes, treating the declared type as advisory only (R-14.2-s, AC-20.26).

```csharp
public static string? DetectMimeTypeFromMagicBytes(ReadOnlySpan<byte> bytes)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| bytes | The candidate image bytes. |

## Return Value

The detected MIME type, or `null` when no known signature matches.
